prompt: A Japanese movie-poster style anime illustration, vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, showing a teenage schoolgirl seated alone in a classroom at golden hour. She has dark brown hair, long and slightly wavy, gathered into a loose side braid draped over her right shoulder, with soft bangs and warm rim light along the top of her head and hair edges. She wears a cream or light beige sailor-style school uniform with navy trim and a dark blue ribbon bow at the chest. Her pose is quiet and introspective: sitting at a school desk, leaning her cheek into one hand, shoulders slightly curved, looking off to the side with a tired but calm midweek expression. The scene is lit by strong late-afternoon sunlight pouring in from a tall classroom window on the right, creating glowing highlights, dust motes in the air, soft haze, and a nostalgic cinematic mood. In the dimmer left background, include a green classroom chalkboard and 2 small chalkboard erasers or chalk accessories resting on the tray. Use painterly anime realism with rich filmic contrast, delicate facial rendering, textured brushwork, subtle grain, and dramatic poster lighting. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the artwork: on the left side, large vertical white brush lettering reading "真ん中" with smaller handwritten-style vertical text above reading "やっと、"; across the lower middle, large pink calligraphic title text reading "水曜日" diagonally; on the upper right, a vertical tagline reading "週のまんなかで、わっと深呼吸ができる。" Near the lower right, include 3 stacked gold laurel award emblems with small Japanese text inside each. Along the bottom center, add 2 lines of small Japanese tagline text, then a credits block in small Japanese film-poster typography. In the bottom right corner, place a large release date reading 5.29 with "ROADSHOW" beneath it. Overall feeling: soft, melancholic, reassuring, like an understated coming-of-age film poster about an ordinary Wednesday becoming quietly special.
